title: Create: Chromatomancy
description: A fantasy, vanilla+ magitech modpack revolving around Create, Spectrum, and Botania. Infuse the world with color!
body:
# Welcome to Create: Chromatomancy!
Chreate: Chromatomancy is a fantasy-themed magitech modpack revolving around the use of magic and industry in tandem and the exploration of a world with so many secrets to hide...
### Explore an Exciting New World!
With a host of fresh and exciting world-generation changes, explore revamped structures, bask in the natural glow of reimagined biomes, and journey into dangerously redesigned dungeons for precious loot. Using the RPG Series mods, choose your class and customize your loadout with unique spells, weapons, and armor. 
### Automate All the Things!
Dive into the twin automation behemoths of Create and Botania, using mechanical machinery and botanical sorcery to revolutionize your farms and factories. What will you build next?
### Infuse the World With Color!
Uncover the worlds secrets, hidden on the surface and in the depths below, using Spectrum, an exploration-oriented, color-themed magic mod that reveals more of the world to you as you delve deeper into experimentation and discover the world's hidden marvels.

Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
Harvest With Ease: https://github.com/crystal-nest/harvest-with-ease#readme
